source_clause_title: 2. Preventative Maintenance, Inspections & Testing:

entities.name: O&M Contractor
entities.legal_role: Party obligated to perform preventative maintenance, inspections, testing, and sensor calibration services.
entities.evidence_quote: O&M Contractor will have the pyranometer calibrated by the manufacturer of each sensor.

entities.name: Customer
entities.legal_role: Party entitled to receive maintenance reports, notifications of deficiencies, and recommendations for corrective action.
entities.evidence_quote: Inform Customer and warranty providers of all deficiencies identified. Provide Customer with recommendations for corrective action.

entities.name: Array
entities.legal_role: Component subject to inspection for damage, discoloration, delamination, mounting system corrosion, torque markings, and structural bolt torque.
entities.evidence_quote: Inspect photovoltaic (PV) modules for damage, discoloration or delamination. Inspect mounting system for damage or corrosion. Visual inspection of torque markings. Spot check 10% of structural bolts for torque.

entities.name: Inverter
entities.legal_role: Component subject to cleaning, inspection, tightening of wire terminations, and other preventive maintenance per OEM warranty.
entities.evidence_quote: Clean all filters and fans. Inspect inverter pad and container. Tighten wire terminations inside inverter. All other preventive maintenance required by original equipment manufacturer (OEM) warranty.

entities.name: Electrical Balance of System (BOS)
entities.legal_role: Component subject to inspection, thermo-graphic analysis, circuit testing and repair, and terminal connection torque inspection.
entities.evidence_quote: Inspect ground braids, electrodes and conductors for damage. Perform thermo-graphic analysis of combiner boxes, inverters, transformers, and conductor connections to buses, breakers or disconnects. Test and record all circuits, open circuit voltage and short circuit current and repair any fault circuits. Inspection of all terminal connections for torque.

entities.name: Meteorological Station
entities.legal_role: Component subject to inspection and cleaning if present at the site.
entities.evidence_quote: Inspect weather measurement equipment for damage. Clean pyranometers and reference cells.

entities.name: Site Conditions
entities.legal_role: Subject of inspection for drainage, vegetation shading/fire hazards, safety conditions, and signage.
entities.evidence_quote: Inspect drainage conditions. Inspect vegetation for array shading or fire hazards, and remove any obstructions causing shade or hazard issues, including ongoing tree trimming as needed. Inspect safety conditions and proper signage.

entities.name: Maintenance Reporting
entities.legal_role: Obligation to record inspection results, photograph defects, inform Customer and warranty providers of deficiencies, and provide corrective action recommendations.
entities.evidence_quote: Record results of all inspections. Take photographs of any damage or defects identified. Inform Customer and warranty providers of all deficiencies identified. Provide Customer with recommendations for corrective action.

entities.name: Sensor Calibration
entities.legal_role: Obligation to calibrate pyranometers every 24 months, perform field comparisons, adjust sensors, and replace pyranometers if needed.
entities.evidence_quote: Every twenty-four (24) months, O&M Contractor will have the pyranometer calibrated by the manufacturer of each sensor. Field comparison of pyranometers and reference cells to calibrated sensor. Adjust field sensor to within ±3% of calibrated sensor and record changed parameters. O&M Contractor may replace pyranometers in lieu of field calibration.

relationships.legal_significance: O&M Contractor is obligated to inspect the Array components as part of preventative maintenance.
relationships.evidence_quote: Inspect photovoltaic (PV) modules for damage, discoloration or delamination. Inspect mounting system for damage or corrosion. Visual inspection of torque markings. Spot check 10% of structural bolts for torque.

relationships.legal_significance: O&M Contractor must clean, inspect, tighten, and perform OEM-required maintenance on the Inverter.
relationships.evidence_quote: Clean all filters and fans. Inspect inverter pad and container. Tighten wire terminations inside inverter. All other preventive maintenance required by original equipment manufacturer (OEM) warranty.

relationships.legal_significance: O&M Contractor must inspect, analyze, test, and repair Electrical Balance of System components.
relationships.evidence_quote: Inspect ground braids, electrodes and conductors for damage. Perform thermo-graphic analysis of combiner boxes, inverters, transformers, and conductor connections to buses, breakers or disconnects. Test and record all circuits, open circuit voltage and short circuit current and repair any fault circuits. Inspection of all terminal connections for torque.

relationships.legal_significance: O&M Contractor must inspect and clean meteorological station equipment if present.
relationships.evidence_quote: Inspect weather measurement equipment for damage. Clean pyranometers and reference cells.

relationships.legal_significance: O&M Contractor must inspect site conditions and remove obstructions causing shading or hazards.
relationships.evidence_quote: Inspect drainage conditions. Inspect vegetation for array shading or fire hazards, and remove any obstructions causing shade or hazard issues, including ongoing tree trimming as needed. Inspect safety conditions and proper signage.

relationships.legal_significance: O&M Contractor must report inspection results, document defects, notify Customer and warranty providers of deficiencies, and recommend corrective actions.
relationships.evidence_quote: Record results of all inspections. Take photographs of any damage or defects identified. Inform Customer and warranty providers of all deficiencies identified. Provide Customer with recommendations for corrective action.

relationships.legal_significance: O&M Contractor must inform Customer of all deficiencies identified during maintenance.
relationships.evidence_quote: Inform Customer and warranty providers of all deficiencies identified.

relationships.legal_significance: O&M Contractor must perform sensor calibration every 24 months and related adjustments or replacements.
relationships.evidence_quote: Every twenty-four (24) months, O&M Contractor will have the pyranometer calibrated by the manufacturer of each sensor. Field comparison of pyranometers and reference cells to calibrated sensor. Adjust field sensor to within ±3% of calibrated sensor and record changed parameters. O&M Contractor may replace pyranometers in lieu of field calibration.

extractor_notes: This clause details the O&M Contractor's maintenance and inspection obligations on various system components and site conditions, as well as reporting and sensor calibration duties. The Customer is the recipient of reports and notifications. No explicit termination or breach relationships are stated despite the clause type hint.
